name: Perfection Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and chop the jar of pimientos.
2. In a medium saucepan, soften gelatin in lemon juice; let stand 1 minute.
3. Over low heat, cook until gelatin dissolves. Add water, sugar, vinegar, and salt; stir until sugar dissolves.
4. Chill until partially set. Fold in remaining ingredients; pour into lightly oiled 6-cup mold.
5. Chill until set, about 3 hours or overnight. Refrigerate leftovers.
